name: Ezra Pound

acts.description: Made pro-fascist radio broadcasts from Italy during World War II supporting Mussolini and Hitler
Virulent anti-Semitic views expressed in writings and broadcasts over decades

behavior_summary: One of the most important modernist poets made pro-fascist radio broadcasts for Mussolini and was indicted for treason by the US government. Avoided trial by being declared insane.

notable_works: In a Station of the Metro
art.summary: Central architect of literary modernism. Championed Eliot, Hemingway, and Joyce. The Cantos remain one of the most ambitious poetic projects in English.

accountability_events: 1945 declared mentally unfit for trial, confined to St. Elizabeths Hospital
1958 released after poets lobbied on his behalf

verdict.blurb: He edited The Waste Land into existence and broadcast for Mussolini. He called for violence against Jews on Italian radio while American soldiers were dying to stop exactly that. His poet friends got him declared insane rather than face trial. He walked free.
